-0.0043*exp(2.4034*exp(0.3325*x_1) + 0.1972*sin(2.2954*x_2 + 4.289)) - 0.1182*sinh(-0.2893*(0.0684 - x_2)**2 + 0.2376*sinh(0.8124 - 1.2579*x_1) + 0.2348) - 0.3128

-0.4196*exp(0.3325*x_1) + 3.0169*exp(0.054*(0.0684 - x_2)**2 - 0.0443*sinh(0.8124 - 1.2579*x_1)) - 0.0344*sin(2.2954*x_2 + 4.289) - 1.3172
